indicators.name: no flat personal work surface
indicators.rationale: The absence of any desk or table at sitting height makes it impossible to set up a computer workstation.

indicators.name: no ergonomic seating
indicators.rationale: There is no seating available that would allow for ergonomic positioning while working on a laptop.

indicators.name: high-traffic public layout
indicators.rationale: The open and spacious layout is designed for public gatherings rather than focused individual work.

indicators.name: ambient lighting
indicators.rationale: Ambient lighting does not provide sufficient task illumination for screen work and may cause glare.

reasoning_summary: This indoor scene is highly unsuitable for focused solo computer work. The lack of a flat work surface, ergonomic seating, and a high-traffic layout make it difficult to set up a productive workstation. The ambient lighting also does not provide adequate task illumination for screen work.
